name: Minimalist White
desc: Clean white cyclorama backdrop with soft diffused natural light. Timeless, elegant, and perfect for all family sizes.

name: Royal Gold
desc: Luxurious dark backdrop with warm golden accents. Draped fabric and ornate props that evoke regal celebration.

name: Tropical Botanica
desc: Lush tropical greenery and botanical arrangements. Vibrant, fresh, and full of life.

name: Classic Dark
desc: Dramatic dark studio with cinematic moody lighting. Bold, sophisticated, and unforgettable.
